strengths: Real-time OSINT dashboard with DOZENS of live global feeds (confirmed Mar 2026)

Space Weather Badge — Live geomagnetic storm Kp index from NOAA SWPC
Internet Outage Monitoring — Georgia Tech IODA regional connectivity alerts

Carrier Strike Group Tracker — all 11 US Navy carriers with OSINT-estimated positions (NEW Mar 2026)
SIGINT/RISINT News Feed — user-customizable up to 20 sources with priority weights (NEW Mar 2026)
Redesigned tabbed Settings panel (API Keys / News Feeds)
Mission Briefing onboarding modal for new users
Single MapLibre unified map interface (Next.js + MapLibre GL + FastAPI + Python)
